headcount_quote: As of September 27, 2025, the Company had approximately 166,000 full-time equivalent employees.
research_notes: Apple FY2025 10-K (accession 0000320193-25-000079) contains no role or function breakdown. Human Capital section discloses only total FTE count plus boilerplate on culture, compensation, and benefits. R&D expenses ~$34.55B driven by headcount-related expenses but no R&D headcount figure given. Apple publishes EEO-1 data separately (apple.com/diversity/pdf/) using EEOC categories (U.S.-only) but this was not accessible and is not part of the 10-K. Third-party LinkedIn-derived breakdowns (e.g., engineering ~41%) are not authoritative. No role data injected per policy of real-filings-only.
